parameters.content:
## ⚙️ 5 Steps to Activate

**1. Apify** – Replace `YOUR_APIFY_TOKEN` in the 5 Apify nodes (apify.com/account/integrations)

**2. Claude API** – Replace `YOUR_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` in the Claude node (console.anthropic.com)

**3. Google Sheets** – Create a sheet with 5 tabs:
`Wedding Planners` · `Festivals` · `Event Managers` · `Théâtres` · `Jeunes Artistes`
Headers row: name, city, website, email, phone, rating, reviewsCount, address, googleMapsUrl, email_subject, email_body
Replace `YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID_HERE` + connect Google Sheets credential in all 5 GS nodes.

**4. Dropcontact** – Replace the NoOp with Dropcontact node for email enrichment

**5. Instantly.ai** – Replace the NoOp with HTTP Request to Instantly API

parameters.jsonBody: {"searchStringsArray":["festival musique France","festival arts spectacle France","festival événementiel France"],"maxCrawledPlaces":10,"language":"fr","countryCode":"fr","maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch":10}

parameters.content:
**Dropcontact placeholder**
Replace with the Dropcontact node.
Enriches professional emails using website + contact name.
Run BEFORE AI personalisation so email_body can reference real contacts.

**Claude (Anthropic) – Email Personalisation**

Generates a pain-point email (subject + body) per lead.
Cost: ~€0.003/lead · ~€1.50 for 500 leads

Replace `YOUR_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` with your key from console.anthropic.com

**Instantly.ai – Outreach**

Replace with HTTP Request to Instantly API.
4 campaigns · 3-email sequence: J+0, J+3, J+7

Sequence:
• Email 1: Pain Point accroche (AI generated)
• Email 2: Preuve sociale + réalisation
• Email 3: CTA doux (appel 15 min)

## 🔗 PhantomBuster LinkedIn Scraping

**Active while Apify has no credits.**

**Setup (one-time):**
1. Create account at phantombuster.com (free tier: 2h/month)
2. Add phantom: **LinkedIn Search Export**
3. Configure search queries:
   - Event Managers: `"event manager" OR "directeur événementiel" France`
   - Théâtres: `"directeur théâtre" OR "programmateur" France`
4. Add your LinkedIn session cookie to the phantom
5. Copy the Phantom Agent ID (from URL in PB dashboard)
6. Replace in nodes:
   - `YOUR_PHANTOMBUSTER_API_KEY` → from phantombuster.com/api-dashboard
   - `YOUR_PHANTOM_ID_EVENT_MANAGERS` → your phantom ID
   - `YOUR_PHANTOM_ID_THEATRES` → your phantom ID

**When Apify is recharged:** Both Apify + PB lanes will run — deduplication handles overlaps.

parameters.jsonBody: {"id":"YOUR_PHANTOM_ID_EVENT_MANAGERS","argument":{"searches":["Responsable Événementiel France","Chief Happiness Officer France","Event Planner Corporate France","Directeur Communication événementiel France","Organisateur salons France","Responsable Sponsoring France","Chargé projet Incentive France"],"numberOfProfiles":10,"filters":{"type":"people","companyHeadcount":"51-200,201-500,501-1000,1001-5000,5001-10000,10001+"},"csvName":"event_managers_linkedin"}}

{"id":"YOUR_PHANTOM_ID_THEATRES","argument":{"searches":["Directeur Théâtre France","Chargé Diffusion spectacle France","Directeur Artistique théâtre France","Responsable Programmation culturelle France","Administrateur spectacle vivant France","Relations Publiques Culture France"],"numberOfProfiles":10,"filters":{"type":"people"},"companyKeywords":["Théâtre","Scène Nationale","Centre Dramatique","Opéra","Philharmonie"],"csvName":"theatres_linkedin"}}
{"searchQueries":["Wedding Planner Luxe","Destination Wedding France","Organisation mariage de prestige","Wedding Designer"],"resultsLimit":10}
